features.heading: Why PawTaker?
features.subtitle: A community-first platform built on trust, transparency, and care.

zeroCost.title: Zero Cost
zeroCost.body: No money changes hands. Use points to give and receive care — it's a fair exchange for everyone.

verified.title: Verified Members
verified.body: Every sitter is ID-verified before they can offer care, so you always know who's with your pet.

safety.title: Real-time Updates
safety.body: Get photo check-ins and messages while your pet is being looked after.

takers.heading: Meet Our Takers
takers.subtitle: Verified community members ready to care for your pet.

appPreview.heading: Your pets deserve the best — download PawTaker
appPreview.subtitle: Available soon on iOS and Android. Join the waitlist to be first in line.
appPreview.storeNote: Coming soon. Join the waitlist today.

messages.body: "Max ate all his food and had a great walk!"

checkins.title: Check-in photo received
checkins.body: Bella is playing in the garden 🌿

about.heading: Our Story
about.mission: PawTaker was born from a simple belief: pet care should be built on community, not commerce. We connect pet owners with trusted neighbours who are passionate about animals.
about.pointsOverProfit: By replacing money with points, we remove financial barriers and create a genuine exchange of care. Every member both gives and receives — that's what makes PawTaker different.

founderVision.heading: The Founder's Vision
founderVision.body: After struggling to find affordable, trustworthy care for his own dog, our founder Fabrice set out to build a platform where trust is earned through community, not credit cards. PawTaker is that platform.

steps.heading: How PawTaker Works
steps.subtitle: Four simple steps to safe, community-powered pet care.

join.title: Create your profile
join.body: Sign up, complete KYC verification, and set up your pet or taker profile in minutes.

postOrTake.title: Post a request or offer care
postOrTake.body: Owners post care requests; takers apply. Browse listings and connect with the right match.

earnPoints.title: Exchange points
earnPoints.body: No cash — just points. Give care to earn them, spend them when you need help.

peaceOfMind.title: Stay informed
peaceOfMind.body: Receive real-time check-in photos and messages throughout the care session.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

kyc.question: Why do I need to verify my identity?
kyc.answer: KYC verification ensures every member of the community is who they say they are, keeping pets and owners safe.

points.question: How do points work?
points.answer: You earn points by providing care and spend them when you need care for your own pets. There is no cash involved.

emergencies.question: What happens in an emergency?
emergencies.answer: Takers are expected to contact the owner immediately and follow the care instructions provided. Our support team is available around the clock.
